behaviors.description: The review input is scoped to the lines that changed, not the full content of each modified file.
behaviors.justification: This is a module-handoff/scoping behavior (diff extraction -> review payload builder). A unit test of one parser/helper can miss wiring mistakes, so Integration is needed. Rejected System because behavior text does not require real HTTP/API side-effect verification; rejected Agentic/Workflow because no model-output-quality or multi-agent-step requirement is stated.
behaviors.test_description: Run the real diff-parsing and prompt-construction modules together on a fixture PR diff containing large unchanged regions; assert the produced review input includes only changed hunks/lines and excludes unchanged file content.

behaviors.description: Inline comments are attached to the correct positions in the diff view on the pull request.
behaviors.justification: Correct diff-position attachment is externally visible and depends on real PR API contract/round-trip visibility (post comment, then verify rendered/returned position). This hits SYSTEM TRIAD (external contract + side-effect readback). Rejected Agentic/Workflow because correctness here is mapping/placement, not model judgment.
behaviors.test_description: Against a real test PR, post inline comments using computed diff anchors, then read back review comments from the hosting API/UI-facing fields and verify each appears at the intended file/hunk/line position.

behaviors.description: The agent identifies at least one real defect in a pull request that contains a known introduced bug.
behaviors.justification: This is model decision quality (finding a real bug), which mocks cannot validate; deterministic stubs would hide failure. Rejected Workflow because the behavior asks for a single outcome (detect at least one real defect), not correctness across multiple dependent agentic decisions.
behaviors.test_description: Run analysis with a real model on a PR/diff fixture containing a seeded known bug and assert at least one returned finding correctly flags that defect class/location with acceptable semantic match criteria.

behaviors.description: Every finding listed in the top-level summary corresponds to a posted inline comment ID from the same run.
behaviors.justification: This is cross-module state consistency (inline post results -> summary assembler). Integration is needed to catch handoff/run-context bugs. Rejected System because behavior text does not require validating external response contracts beyond internal ID linkage; rejected Agentic/Workflow because mapping correctness does not depend on model output quality.
behaviors.test_description: Execute orchestration with real posting/result-collection and summary-construction modules using deterministic findings; assert each summary item references an inline comment ID emitted in that same run context and no foreign/stale IDs appear.

behaviors.description: No inline finding is dropped from the final summary payload before posting.
behaviors.justification: This is pipeline completeness across local stages (findings list -> inline posting results -> summary payload). Integration catches handoff/filtering regressions that unit tests of individual functions can miss. Rejected System because the stated risk is pre-post payload loss, not external API contract behavior; rejected Agentic/Workflow because no model-quality or multi-agentic-step dependence is required.
behaviors.test_description: Run end-to-end local orchestration with a fixed findings set and instrument stage outputs; assert cardinality and stable identifiers show every posted inline finding is present in the final summary payload.

behaviors.description: The automation sequence (read diff, post inline comments, post summary) succeeds for a real pull request when provided a fixed precomputed finding set.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly requires a real PR and externally visible side effects across real API calls (read diff, post inline, post summary), satisfying SYSTEM TRIAD happy-path/round-trip checks. Rejected Agentic/Workflow because findings are precomputed (no model-decision dependence).
behaviors.test_description: Run the production sequence against a real test PR with fixed findings, then read back PR state via API to verify inline comments and top-level summary were created with expected content and linkage.

behaviors.description: The full live run with model-generated findings (read diff, analyze, post inline comments, post summary) completes correctly for a real pull request without manual intervention.
behaviors.justification: This is a multi-step agentic pipeline: real model-generated findings drive downstream posting and summarization across sequential stages. Failures can emerge from cross-step agentic handoff/replan effects, so Workflow is required. Rejected Agentic because single-step model validation would miss orchestration correctness across the full sequence.
behaviors.test_description: Execute full unattended run on a real test PR using the real model and live API calls; verify completion status, presence/consistency of generated inline comments and summary, and that downstream actions correctly reflect model-produced findings across all stages.
